core_instructions: Maintain the exact facial structure, skin tone, eye color, and unique features of the person in the reference image. Do not alter the identity; ensure the subject remains consistently recognizable as the same individual across all generated variations.

visual_details.subject: A beautiful young East Asian woman with a slender and elegant build.
visual_details.camera: Portrait orientation, medium shot, eye-level angle, shallow depth of field with significant background blur.
visual_details.environment: A dark, minimalist background with soft, out-of-focus golden and orange bokeh lights, creating a moody and sophisticated atmosphere.
visual_details.accessories: Large, blue teardrop-shaped dangling earrings that match the color of the dress.
visual_details.lighting: Soft, cinematic studio lighting that highlights her skin and the texture of her hair, with a gentle glow on her shoulders.
visual_details.clothing: Form-fitting, sleeveless, high-neck midi dress in a vibrant blue color, covered in a dense pattern of small white and light blue flowers with red centers.
visual_details.style: Highly detailed digital realism, polished aesthetic, smooth skin textures, reminiscent of high-end character concept art.
visual_details.posing: Standing waist-up portrait, hands positioned behind her back, body angled slightly to the side with a graceful posture.
visual_details.face: The face, facial structure, features, skin tone, and expression must match the reference image exactly.
visual_details.hair: The hair color, length, style (high ponytail with bangs), and texture must match the reference image exactly.

usage_hint: Pass this template to any image generator agent with an image reference.
